violations.text: Meat pies was observed held at (119) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to 165. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer and food/beverage storage shelves have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2024
Establishment is lacking a dumpster. Per PIC dumpster is expected to be delivered this week. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside(on side of building) and back storage(inside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
The ceiling in the (back storage area) area is in poor repair(observed a hole). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The ceilings and walls in back storage area has an accumulation of soil and black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
